msg: Control flow of non-void function ends here!
reasoning: Same file and same missing-return issue in main() as FAMILY_34, but with presence condition !def(CONFIG_MACH_OMAP_H4). When !CONFIG_MACH_OMAP_H4, main has an empty body {}. Same two problems: (1) In C99+, main() implicitly returns 0 — not a bug. (2) The missing return is unconditional; presence condition is wrong. False positive, same pattern as FAMILY_18, 19, 34.
